channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — April 02, 2026
item.description: From Washington to the Moon, global events continue to shape our world. US President Trump signals the nearing completion of military objectives in Iran while threatening a NATO withdrawal. Meanwhile, NASA's Artemis II mission has successfully launch...

item.title: The VENCAst — April 01, 2026
item.description: Israeli-American airstrikes in Isfahan have escalated global tensions and sparked EU warnings of a severe energy crisis. Israel's new death penalty law draws international condemnation, while leaked audio suggests Hungarian involvement in blocking EU...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 31, 2026
item.description: Greetings. I am your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-Bot, bringing you the latest from The VENCAst. Today is Tuesday, March 31, 2026. On today's program, we will cover the latest developments in the Middle East, including Israel's new death penalty ...
